tools.name: region_currency
tools.description: ISO currency code for a region.

tools.name: get_orders
tools.signature: get_orders(region: str, category: str, month_start: int, month_end: int) -> list[int]
tools.description: Paid/refunded order ids for a region, product category, and inclusive month window.

tools.name: order_gross_usd
tools.description: Gross order revenue in USD before discounts/refunds.

tools.name: order_margin_usd
tools.description: Gross order margin in USD before discounts/refunds.

tools.name: refund_usd
tools.description: Refund amount in USD for returned quantity on an order.

tools.name: customer_tier
tools.description: Customer loyalty tier for an order.

tools.name: apply_discount
tools.description: Apply the order customer's loyalty discount to a USD amount.

tools.name: net_revenue_usd
tools.description: Net USD revenue after loyalty discount and refunds.

tools.name: to_local
tools.description: Convert a USD integer amount to a local-currency integer.

tools.name: inventory_position
tools.description: Available inventory position: on_hand - reserved + inbound.

tools.name: product_lead_time
tools.description: Supplier lead time in days for a product.

tools.name: product_id_for_top_seller
tools.signature: product_id_for_top_seller(region: str, category: str, month_start: int, month_end: int) -> int
tools.description: Product id with the highest units sold in a region/category/month window.

tools.name: units_sold
tools.signature: units_sold(product_id: int, region: str, month_start: int, month_end: int) -> int
tools.description: Units sold for one product in a region and month window.

tools.name: tickets_for_orders
tools.description: Support ticket ids for given orders and severity.

tools.name: ticket_order_id
tools.description: Order id associated with a support ticket.

tools.name: sla_breached
tools.signature: sla_breached(ticket_id: int, first_response_limit_hours: int, resolution_limit_hours: int) -> bool
tools.description: Whether a support ticket breaches first-response or resolution SLA.

tools.name: delayed_orders
tools.description: Subset of order ids whose ship_days exceeded promised_days.

tools.name: unique_customers
tools.description: Unique customer ids among the given orders.

tools.name: count_items
tools.description: Length of a list.

tools.name: sum_values
tools.description: Sum a list of integers.

tools.name: count_true
tools.description: Count true values.

tools.name: count_below
tools.description: Count values below a threshold.
